creator: SimaMoto@FreeBSD.org
text:
The GIMP Help Documentation Team released the new version
product gimp-help-2.6.0-html.  Version 2.4.x is outdated.

Since this latest version, we had been providing packages in
ready-to-install tarballs separated in translated languages.
Source package doesn't exist.  On the contrary,
Older version was a source tree of XML files and images
gathering whole translated languages.

There are 13 packages in languages provided.  The attached
patch creates mew ports as match as the number of languages.
misc/gimp-help-en is the master port, and other 12 ports
on chinese/, french/, german/, japanese/, korean/, misc/,
polish/, and russian/ are slave ports.

(attached file is the part 2 of 3)
(the part one is ports145650)
Later I found that the third part is not necessary and I'll never
send it because this consecutive reports can be in two parts.
I'm sorry for inconsistency.

Fix: The attached file is bzip2-compressed and uuencoded, because its base
'shar' file is 152048bytes.
It creates:
chinese/gimp-help-zh_CN/
chinese/gimp-help-zh_CN/Makefile
french/gimp-help-fr/
french/gimp-help-fr/Makefile
german/gimp-help-de/
german/gimp-help-de/Makefile
misc/gimp-help-en/
misc/gimp-help-en/Makefile
misc/gimp-help-en/distinfo
misc/gimp-help-en/pkg-descr
misc/gimp-help-en/pkg-plist
misc/gimp-help-es/
misc/gimp-help-es/Makefile
misc/gimp-help-it/
misc/gimp-help-it/Makefile
misc/gimp-help-nl/
misc/gimp-help-nl/Makefile
misc/gimp-help-nn/
misc/gimp-help-nn/Makefile
misc/gimp-help-sv/
misc/gimp-help-sv/Makefile
japanese/gimp-help-ja/
japanese/gimp-help-ja/Makefile
japanese/gimp-help-ko/
japanese/gimp-help-ko/Makefile
polish/gimp-help-pl/
polish/gimp-help-pl/Makefile
russian/gimp-help-ru/
russian/gimp-help-ru/Makefile


Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: outdated document is problematic for user of GIMP 2.6
